description: There are three files available for this experiment: a single-cell count matrix in Matrix Market Exchange format, a cell barcode with a single barcode in each line and a table containing genes ID and related gene name. In this analysis what is necessary is to have identify cell clusters using the Louvain algorithm and provide visualizations including UMPA plots colored by clusters and marker genes. Find the appropriate way to perform this analysis using Galaxy material available and its tools.

expected_outputs.description: Retrieve what was tool used for data normalization.
Count the number of tools used in the workflow and compare it to the expected number of tools.
Read the figure named Dotplot of top genes on clusters and identify the list of genes that are shown in the figure. Compare it to the expected list of genes.

legacy_experiment_outputs.data_normalization: Retrieve what was tool used for data normalization.
legacy_experiment_outputs.list_of_genes: Read the figure named Dotplot of top genes on clusters and identify the list of genes that are shown in the figure. Compare it to the expected list of genes.
legacy_experiment_outputs.total_tool_steps: Count the number of tools used in the workflow and compare it to the expected number of tools.

title: Single-Cell RNA-seq Analysis
